overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a white coat walking through an industrial cantina with metal architecture and scattered NPCs, then entering a narrow corridor. The environment features artificial lighting and a gritty, utilitarian aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cantina with dining tables and bar

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cantina past round dining tables and seated patrons

notable_agents.action: companion in brown vest standing at the bar counter
patron sitting at the bar counter drinking

entered.detail: circular metal dining tables with stools scattered throughout the cantina
large X-shaped metal support beams against the far walls
long curved counter with stools and drink containers on top
hanging industrial light fixtures providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious industrial cantina with round metal tables and X-shaped support beams. Several NPCs are seated at the bar on the right or gathered around tables, while overhead industrial lights illuminate the gritty metal interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow metal corridor leading to inner facility rooms

events.description: character passes through doorway arch from open cantina into narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the narrower corridor section with ribbed metal walls

notable_agents.action: man in work clothes standing against the corridor wall

entered.detail: metal doorway frame marking the transition between the cantina and corridor
vertical ribbed metal wall panels lining the narrow passage
flush-mounted ceiling light fixtures in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed corridor with ribbed metal walls and flush ceiling lights, leaving the open cantina behind. A single NPC stands against the wall as the space transitions from wide and social to narrow and utilitarian.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a spacious, social industrial hub into a restrictive, utilitarian corridor. It begins by trailing a character through a wide cantina filled with round metal tables, X-shaped support beams, and NPCs gathered around a bar under bright industrial lighting. As the character moves forward, the open social space recedes, and the camera follows them through a threshold into a narrow, enclosed passage. The environment then shifts to ribbed metal walls and flush ceiling lights, passing a lone NPC leaning against the wall as the atmosphere becomes increasingly confined.
